title: Email/SMS Spam Classifier
problem_stat: High volume of spam messages reaching users' inboxes.
approach: Used Multinomial Naive Bayes with TF-IDF vectorization for text classification.

title: TaskAgent (Voice UI)
problem_stat: Traditional task managers require manual typing and lack real-time voice feedback.
approach: Integrated Web Speech API for voice recognition and Chart.js for analytics.

title: EngiPlanner
problem_stat: Engineering students need a specialized tool for project and academic planning.
approach: Built a structured scheduling application with React.

title: Movie Recommender System
problem_stat: Users struggle to find relevant movies to watch based on their interests.
approach: Implemented a content-based filtering system using TF-IDF and Cosine Similarity.

title: AI Research Assistant
problem_stat: Academic and research papers are often dense and time-consuming to digest.
approach: Built a Streamlit application using Gemini 1.5 Flash and LangChain to provide interactive, easy-to-understand explanations of research papers.
tech_stack: Streamlit, LangChain, Google Gemini API, PyPDF2

title: Autonomous Web-Search Agent
problem_stat: Standard LLMs have a knowledge cutoff and cannot access real-time information or verify current events independently.
approach: Implemented an autonomous agent using the ReAct (Reasoning and Acting) framework on LangGraph with Tavily and DuckDuckGo Search APIs.
tech_stack: LangChain, LangGraph, Google Gemini API, Tavily Search API

title: Multi-Provider LLM Integration Suite
problem_stat: Organizations struggle to compare and switch between different LLM providers (Google, Hugging Face, Groq) to optimize for cost, speed, or accuracy.
approach: Developed a suite of implementation patterns for integrating and orchestrating various LLMs using Sequential and Parallel Chains.
tech_stack: Google Gemini, Hugging Face Hub, Groq API, LangChain

title: Farmer Crop Advisor
problem_stat: Indian farmers lack accessible, data-driven guidance on which crops to plant based on their soil composition and local weather conditions.
approach: Built an AI-powered crop recommendation system using a Random Forest classifier trained on 2,200+ samples across 22 crops. Integrated live weather data via OpenWeather API and added multi-language support (English, Hindi, Marathi) with Plotly visualizations.
tech_stack: Python, Scikit-learn, Streamlit, Plotly, OpenWeather API, pandas, numpy
